svg.title: Cave attack chain v4
svg.desc: Corrected attack chain: XSS cookie steal is the only path to admin, no JWT forge. LFI, SSH key crack, Drupalgeddon2 pivot, tribe_leader lateral move for user flag, SUID root.

g.text: Port 80 + 22 open — web app with register/login
Register → roasting wall hint: "admin visits silently"
Headless Chrome visits /roasting every 60s → cookie stolen
Replace own cookie with stolen admin cookie
Admin-only endpoint — unlocked by stolen cookie
Unauthenticated RCE via Metasploit → www-data shell
tribe_leader password in commented DB config
